owners.responsibility: Pure domain types: shared values, newtype IDs, wire protocol, repo-graph data model, and context/memory/rule/patch/verify model crates. No I/O. Invariants enforced at the type system.
I/O adapters: settings loading, provider HTTP clients, tmp-copy sandboxing, terminal command surfaces, and tool executors built on top.
Agent runtime: turn loop, completion policy, repair sub-loop, and trait surface for completion/tool/repair-advisor implementations.
Command-line routing, doctor, exec/run launch, diagnostics, and run receipts. Migrates to crates/quorp_cli during Phase 4.
Session lifecycle: streaming chat, tool dispatch, headless agent runner. Migrates to crates/quorp_session and crates/quorp_tools during Phase 4 and 5.
Benchmark manifests, attempts, evaluators, reports, proof receipts, and batch orchestration. Absorbs crates/quorp/src/quorp/benchmark.rs during Phase 2.
Workspace-wide tooling: agent contract files, proof lanes, LOC enforcement.
